hero.badge: Round in progress · Picks · Rankings · Live pools
hero.headline: Make your picks.
hero.subheadline: Compete with thousands of players in real pools. Every match moves the ranking. The top won't wait.
hero.trust: Free to start · No credit card required
hero.timeLine: Takes less than 1 minute · Completely free

problem.headline: Pools are a mess
problem.body: Disorganized groups, picks in chats or Excel, confusing results and endless disputes. Nobody knows who's winning until it's too late.
problem.solutionHeadline: This is how a real pool feels
problem.solutionBody: Everything in one place. Real-time ranking, transparent history and real competition against other players round after round.
painPoints: No ranking, no history, no control

features.headline: Designed to make you want to compete
features.subheadline: Every detail is built so entry is easy, competition is fair, and winning feels incredible.

items.title: Picks in seconds, no friction
items.body: Choose H, D or A for each match. Clean interface that doesn't waste your time. Save and done.

items.title: See exactly where you stand
items.body: The leaderboard updates with every result. You know your position at all times, no guessing.

items.title: More entries = more chances to win
items.body: Play multiple strategies in the same pool. No limit on entries per round.

items.title: No WhatsApp, no Excel, no disputes
items.body: Everything in one place. Picks, results and ranking transparent for everyone.

items.title: Nobody cheats. Everyone plays fair.
items.body: Picks lock at closing automatically. No changes possible. Clean competition.

items.title: Watch yourself improve round by round
items.body: Full history of picks and points. Learn from every round and improve your accuracy.

steps.title: Create your account
steps.body: Sign up in seconds. Verify your email and you're ready to play.

steps.title: Join a pool
steps.body: Choose from active pools. Create one entry (or several) before closing.

steps.title: Make your picks
steps.body: Select Home, Draw or Away for each match. Save before it closes.

steps.title: Compete and climb the ranking
steps.body: Follow results in real time. The ranking shifts with every match. One wrong pick drops you.

startFree.headline: Join.
startFree.subheadline: No complications. Join, play and compete starting today.
startFree.ctaNote: No card · No commitment · Start in seconds

items.q: Can I play with my friends?
items.a: Yes. Join the same pool and compete on the same leaderboard. Watching positions shift in real time is the best part.
Most points at the end wins. Each correct pick adds 1 point. Simple, transparent, no disputes.

items.q: Can I create my own pool?
items.a: Yes. Create the pool, add matches, set the closing date and you're done. Your friends join and compete directly.

items.q: What happens if I miss a pick?
items.a: Nothing is lost. You just don't score that match. While matches remain, everything can change.

items.q: Do I need to pay to play?
items.a: No. PickMaster is completely free. No card, no subscription. Join, play and compete starting today.

finalCta.headline: The ranking
finalCta.subheadline: Enter today and start competing from the very first round.
finalCta.ctaNote: No card · No commitment · Start in seconds

footer.tagline: The sports pool platform for serious players.
